hero.title: 어떤 도시든 몇 분 만에 파악하세요
hero.description: 동네, 교통, 비용, 문화에 대한 핵심 정보를 빠르게 정리했습니다.

setup.title: Set your purpose and nationality
setup.description: Use the Preferences menu in the top navigation to set purpose (Trip, Study, Live) and optional nationality for personalized section order.

trust.title: Trust live signals responsibly
trust.description: Weather, currency, and news blocks always show freshness and source links. Verify stale/fallback data before time-sensitive decisions.
